positive: A minimalist, high-contrast vector illustration of a whimsical woodland creature (such as an owl or fox) perched amongst stylized forest flora. The scene should utilize geometric shapes and bold outlines, presenting a clean silhouette against a solid or gradient background. Color palette should be deep forest greens, muted burnt orange, and creamy ivory. Composition must be central, suitable for a repeating textile pattern or single chest print. Style: Flat vector art, mid-century modern illustration influence, highly graphic, perfect for screen printing. Studio lighting, crisp detail, clean lines.
negative: blurry, amateur, text, watermark, logo, signature, dirty, grunge, low resolution, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, artifacts, photorealistic, depth of field, 3d render
